clusters.justification: These terms closely co-activate within limbic and salience structures responsible for the macroscopic processing of emotional valence and physiological arousal.
These terms map onto frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry responsible for computing subjective utility to drive reward-seeking and goal-directed behavior.
These terms rely on cortical midline structures to support internally directed abstract mental models, encompassing both self-referential processing and the inference of others' states.
